idea.title: Shopify Product Description Packs for E-Commerce
idea.description: 30 prompts for e-commerce store owners to write SEO-optimized, benefit-focused product descriptions that convert browsers into buyers.
idea.rationale: E-commerce store owners represent a massive, monetization-motivated audience with urgent conversion needs, product descriptions are highly repeatable for AI, and SEO-benefit framing adds differentiation beyond generic free templates.
